{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192626C8029E8F0623D5110F25"}"},"total":195},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7493331499376444184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得还不错，我个人还是挺喜欢看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744683166,"group_id":"7468878818627832856","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1sDne1VjUkKTLYM0I4AD4mB8zceK3EgsKhLGXz5o9In","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"1830000822060328","user_name":"爱吃酸汤揪面的老紫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1830000822060328","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7468878818627832856","book_info":{"abstract":"【足球热血+系统重生+天才逆袭+征服欧洲】
他曾是华超替补席上最昂贵的观众——身家上亿的足球痴少林锋，在意外中重生为2015年多特蒙德青训营的华裔弃子。

当球王系统在威斯特法伦的星空下苏醒，世界足坛的格局开始震颤：
「神级视野」让他在U18联赛上演上帝视角的鬼魅直塞；
「致命弧线」撕碎拜仁青年军的钢铁防线；
「鹰眼计算」在鲁尔区德比完成惊世骇俗的60米贴地斩！

从被青训教练嘲讽"东方花瓶"，到让多特主席连夜修改续约条款；
从在德国杯决赛替补登场绝杀拜仁，到伯纳乌八万人高呼"龙裔魔术师"；
当金球奖颁奖典礼的聚光灯照亮那张东方面孔，整个欧洲终于明白——
这个带着系统重生的男人，不仅要改写华国足球的屈辱史，更要用足尖在欧罗巴大陆刻下新的王座。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o89502fd2ec29b1e95057a5f5a1e33049~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"sun晚风吹","author_id":"","book_id":"7468878818627832856","book_name":"满级传球，从多特青训杀穿全欧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8774人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7470423682758738457","read_count":"8774","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1320461"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"460","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,重生,天才,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/05e002bb7771de973d3359bc6e77b721~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362786&x-signature=QXJ6nojOGgHqhw8LtqqtMtz4kjc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1011153717692239","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"127"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192626C8029E8F0623D5110F25"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":
